note: On Tor, ~83% of fetches never see a captcha (clean exit = $0). The 16.5% captcha tax is the whole problem. Imperva clears a real browser silently via the reese84/utmvc sensor token — the doodle only fires on LOW-TRUST exits. Datacenter/Tor IPs are the #1 trust killer; residential/mobile proxies + a consistent real-Chrome fingerprint + preserved incap_ses/visid_incap/reese84 cookies should push captcha rate toward ~0.
